notes: Excellent implementation with proper multi-step navigation, comprehensive review assertions, and well-structured retry logic using data-testid selectors. Minor issues: (1) Browser cleanup not explicitly in try/finally—relies on context manager cleanup which may not execute if exceptions occur before browser.close(); (2) Duplicate test files (test_form.py and test_form_1.py) suggest unnecessary duplication. All three steps navigate correctly, form validation is respected with valid test data, state dropdown uses select_option properly, and success panel verification includes regex validation of submission ID. Screenshot capture implemented. Code is well-organized with reusable helper functions.
